---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#20: graphQL & noSQL, openCode AI (III)`` (April 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| **#20** | 67 | 27/04/2026 | - <s>Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </BR> (1) new data model </br> (2) 3 items: person, course and calendar </br> (3) dynamoDB SDK Java queries </br> (4) refactor `personService`</s>  </br></br> ++ Spring, React, GraphQL **Full Stack Project** `Polymarket` </br> (1) **Understand the needs** & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br>(4) Create sprint plan (all tasks, `product backlog`) </br>  <s>(5) Create requirements docs for openCode AI </br> (6) Create implementation details </s> | - [noSqlPerson: 8c2a3d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/18c2a3dd54b9a2a572e6a97db20ca34f67f18a75){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [noSqlPerson: 02a9ec](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/02a9ec09b117254f4475cfad7068769cc27daf07){.external target='_blank'}  </br>    - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br></br>- [Project: realtime Polymarket](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Real-TimePolymarket.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SpreadSheet Polymarket](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SRePcx1pG46F6KjNXAQ1nztGowOjtxZwa_Vk39gfi-c/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Polymarket](https://polymarket.com/?via=mc){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Polymarket API](https://docs.polymarket.com/api-reference/introduction){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [SCRUM:week1](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 68 | 28/04/2026 | - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </BR> (1) **new data model**  </br> (2) 3 items: person, course and calendar </br> (3) dynamoDB SDK Java queries </br> (4) refactor `personService` </br> (5) test stress </br></br> - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1) Understand the needs & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) **Create sprint plan**: 4 `sprints`  </br> (5) Create requirements docs for openCode AI: `tech stack & architecture` </br> (6) Create implementation details    | - [Project: realtime Polymarket](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Real-TimePolymarket.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [SpreadSheet Polymarket](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SRePcx1pG46F6KjNXAQ1nztGowOjtxZwa_Vk39gfi-c/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [visily](https://www.visily.ai/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Neon Postgres](https://neon.com/){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [noSqlPerson: dbbcc](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/dbbcce435dd6a0200b2f6c63ea499783de832d60){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Test stress Java SDK-DynamoDB Write](https://gist.github.com/AlbertProfe/a31837e33bae711646700d498111f9a3){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Test stress Java SDK-DynamoDB Read](https://gist.github.com/AlbertProfe/2c2b5fa8986ead6c645f5d3809d94348){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [NoSqlPersonApplicationTests](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/dbbcce435dd6a0200b2f6c63ea499783de832d60/noSqlPerson/src/test/java/dev/cifo/noSqlPerson/NoSqlPersonApplicationTests.java){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 69 | 29/04/2026 | - <s>openCode AI + Memory implementation</s> </br> </br> - MF02: test & prova pràctica  </br></br> - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </BR> (1) new data model  </br> (2) 3 items: `person`, `course` and `calendar` </br> (3) dynamoDB SDK Java queries </br> (4) refactor `personService` </br> (5) **test for `ExtraAttributes`** |  - [noSqlPerson: dbbcc](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/dbbcce435dd6a0200b2f6c63ea499783de832d60){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  - [noSqlPerson: e7f148](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/e7f14823ce1443d8bf9d87a0f228696bc6b86b13){.external target='_blank'}      </br></br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/appsync-test-stress.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Bash script](https://gist.github.com/AlbertProfe/9315a1770fa8115b3180bbd3d5dcb39f){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [ExtraAttributesConverter.java](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/e7f14823ce1443d8bf9d87a0f228696bc6b86b13/noSqlPerson/src/main/java/dev/cifo/noSqlPerson/person/ExtraAttributesConverter.java){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/extra-attributes-person.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}|

: Backlog Sprint#20 April 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
